name: caresync
description: CareSync Healthcare Ecosystem - Full Stack Application

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.build: npm run install:all && cd frontend && npm run build
scripts.upgrade:all: npm run upgrade:backend && npm run upgrade:frontend
scripts.upgrade:backend: npx npm-check-updates -u --cwd backend && npm install --prefix backend
scripts.upgrade:frontend: npx npm-check-updates -u --cwd frontend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.build:android: cd frontend && npm run build && npx cap sync android
scripts.open:android: cd frontend && npx cap open android
scripts.build:apk:win: npm run build:android && cd frontend/android && gradlew clean assembleDebug
scripts.build:apk:mac: npm run build:android && cd frontend/android && ./gradlew clean assembleDebug
